h1.visual_description: Large, bold, all-caps, sans-serif font in a bright blue color. Used for primary section titles.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, bold, all-caps, sans-serif font in black. Used for secondary titles or subtitles.

h3.visual_description: Small, bold, sans-serif font in black, typically followed by a colon. Used for category headers within lists.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Unordered list item indicating specific actions or points.
Call to action for external digital resources and further information.
Highlighted call-to-action or summary section for general audience.
Decorative and thematic visual elements representing the subject matter (manatees, turtles, fish, seagrass).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Illustrative graphics located at the top and bottom margins of panels, such as the boat/dolphin header and the seagrass/sea life footer.
